header.title: Support Our Mission
header.subtitle: Fill out the form below to volunteer, donate, or ask us anything.

sections.helpIntent: How Would You Like to Help?

fields.messageLabel: Why do you want to support our cause?
fields.messagePlaceholder: Why do you want to support our cause?
fields.contactPreferenceLabel: How would you prefer us to contact you?
fields.contactPreferencePlaceholder: How would you prefer us to contact you?
fields.consentText: I confirm that the information I've provided is accurate and I consent to being contacted via my selected method. I agree to the Privacy Policy and understand my data will be processed for the purpose of handling this request.
fields.consentNote: Your details are kept confidential and won't be shared without permission.

footer.responseTime: We usually respond within 1-2 working days.
